name: Character turnaround sheet
purpose: Identity anchor. Universal reference fed into every downstream character generation across NB2, Midjourney, and Seedance to lock face, hair, wardrobe, manicure, and psychotype.
midjourney_prompt: four panel character turnaround sheet, mid-20s East Asian woman, jet black collarbone hair with two asymmetric face-framing strands, porcelain matte skin, black fine-merino turtleneck, black tailored trousers, bare hands with glossy oxblood almond manicure, unsmiling composed gaze, studio seamless charcoal backdrop, even softbox light, cinematic anamorphic reference sheet, fine grain --ar 16:9 --style raw
nano_banana_2_prompt:
Subject: mid-20s East Asian woman, 170cm lean build, jet black collarbone-length straight hair with cool undertones and a soft center parting, two locked asymmetric face-framing strands (longer left past the jaw, shorter right at the cheekbone), porcelain cool matte skin, oval face with sharp jawline, almond dark-brown eyes with steady unsmiling gaze, straight nose, full lower lip in nude-mauve matte. Wearing black fine-merino turtleneck, black tailored trousers, bare hands with glossy oxblood almond manicure.

Style: editorial character reference sheet, four panels side by side (front / three-quarter left / profile left / back), consistent identity across all four panels.

Composition: full-body framing in each panel, feet to head, even spacing, subject centered in each panel, neutral standing pose with arms relaxed at sides.

Lighting: large softbox overhead and slight fill from camera-left, even exposure across all panels, low-contrast, no dramatic shadows, shadow rolloff soft and cool.

Background: seamless charcoal #1a1a1a paper, no texture, no gradient.

Color palette: black wardrobe, oxblood nails, charcoal background, porcelain skin — no warm orange.

Avoid: smiling, teeth showing, jewellery, claw gloves, silver gloves, rings, heavy makeup, HDR glow, symmetric bangs, blunt fringe, color shift to warm orange on skin.

edits_history.change: Initial draft from character lock + art direction.
